message:
fix(actor,gen_server): wake actor on cancel request and clean up task records on spawn failure

actor: Call sender.wake_receiver() after setting cancel_requested in both
cancel() and cancel_with_reason() so the actor's message loop wakes up
immediately to observe cancellation rather than blocking until the next
message arrives. Mark result_rx bindings as mut for new oneshot API.

gen_server: Fix task record cleanup on spawn failure -- when a region is
closed during spawn, the task record and region entry are now properly
removed via region_record.remove_task(task_id) and
state.remove_task(task_id) before returning RegionClosed error, preventing
dangling task record leaks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
